title: Create: Netherrack Recipe
description: Create Add-on That Adds Recipe For Netherrack,  Allowing Players To Automate It.  Pour 100mb Of Lava Onto A Clay Block
body: ## 🌱 About Create: Netherrack Recipe is an add-on for the Create mod, available as both a mod and a datapack. It introduces a new recipe for Netherrack, allowing players to renewably get Netherrack. ## 📋 Recipe |Result|Ingredients|Type| |---|---|---| |1x Netherrack|1x Clay + 50mB of Lava|Filling| Tip: Use [Just Enough Items(JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) To View The Recipe In-Game ![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be9521668659c180d576d79dcc9e693913f0276e.png) ## 🧩 Installation Guide **How to Install the Mod (.jar)** 1. Download the Mod: Get the .jar file. 2. Drop the File: Drag the downloaded .jar file into the mods folder. **How to Install the Datapack (.zip)** 1. Download: Get the .zip file for the Datapack version. 2. Open Your World Folder: 3. Install: Open the datapacks folder and drag the downloaded .zip file inside. ## ⚙️ Supported Version |Version|Loader|Support| |---|---|---| |1.21.1|NeoForge|✅| |1.20.1|Forge/Neoforge|✅| |1.20.1|Fabric|✅| ## 📦 Other Recipes For Create # 👀 Play with friends Want to run a flawless modded server?
